title: Online%20Type%20Approval%20System%20for%20Tanzania%20Communications%20Regulatory%20Authority%20%20Case%20Study

Customer  
Tanzania Communications 
Regulatory Authority (TCRA), 
established by the TCRA Act no. 
12 of 2003 is an independent 
authority for the Postal, 
Broadcasting and Electronic 
communications industries in the 
United Republic of Tanzania.

Regulatory Authority

TCRA was facing challenges to 
have a method of checking the 
compatibility of all electronic 
communications equipment with 
other operating electronic 
communication network.

based solution, Online Type 
Approval System (OTAS), for the

 Flexibility and enhanced

  Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority  
Grows Customer Base and Expands Globally   
 
Customer Profile  
The major functions performed by Tanzania Communications Regulatory 
Authority TCRA include licensing and regulating the postal services, 
broadcasting services and Electronic Communications sectors in the United 
Republic of Tanzania.  
TCRA is responsible for enhancing the welfare of Tanzanians through:  
 
 Promotin g the availability of regulated services;  
 Promotion of effective competition and economic efficiency; 
Protec ting the interests of consumers  
 Licensing and enforcing license conditions of broadcasting, postal 
and Telecommunications operators;  
 Establishing standards for regulated goods and services; Regulating 
rates and charges (tariffs) ;  
 Managing the radio f requency spectrum; and monitoring  the 
performance of the regulated secto rs and implementation of ICT 
applications.  
 
Business Situation  
At Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority (TCRA), there was no 
secured and user -friendly sys tem to allow users to apply for type approval 
and certification of the equipment online. TCRA was facing challenges to 
have a method of checking the compatibility of all electronic 
communications equipment with other operating electronic communication 
netw ork. 
TCRA was not able to maintain contact records of the user and monitor 
when a user has successfully registered, applied for type approval and the 
progress of the application. So, TCRA felt the need of a system which will 
allow users to apply for type a pproval and certification of the equipment 
online.  
 
 
 
 
IT Solutions                IT Products               Education &  Training               BPO / ITES  
 
 
Online Type Approval System  for Com munications 
Regulatory Authorities  
 

 
Copyright © 201 4 Techno Brain. All rights reserved.  
www.technobraingroup.com  Case Study  
Solution   
 
Techno Brain was selected to provide a web -based solution, Online Type Approval System (OTAS), for the regulatory 
business of TCRA. The solution has enabled both TCRA and their customers t o access the system. The solution enabled 
TCRA to be more interactive and transparent with its customers in terms of business, business relations, company policies 
and its terms of service.  
 
TCRA – OTAS Solution consists of three (3) modules namely – Users , Approvers and Accounts Modules . Each module has 
specific user access, functions and tasks allocated. These modules are interlinked and can interchange data among them. 
Through the use of a dedicated MOSS solution, TCRA is able to engage in nationwide bus iness collaboration, while 
guaranteeing secure access to confidential information via site permissions.  
 
Major features of Online Type Approval System :  
 
 Module based architecture - Users, Approvers and Accounts Modules  
 Module based access, functions and t asks allocated.  
 Secure nationwide business  collaboration  through d edicated MOSS solution  
 
Technologies:  MOSS, SQL Server 2008, Windows Server 2008  
 
Benefits  
The web solution provided by Techno Brain has enabled TCRA to spread its se rvices across the globe and has f etched it 
more business, more customers and provided its customers a simple an d systematic path to meet their b usiness needs.  
 
Key benefits of Online Type Approval System :  
 
 Provides more flexibility & better collaboration   
 Enables strong customer  relationships  
 Improves regulatory system  
 Provides content management  
 Enables enterprise search  
 Accelerates business processes  
 Ensures customer satisfaction
